title: codereview: coap_dtn.c s_last_confession/s_provider protection incomplete
description: Current coap_dtn.c has mutexes for dtn_buffer and senml_pack but no s_last_confession array or s_provider. The rate limiting uses dtn_has_messages_for under lock. coap_config.c has unprotected s_provider pointer accessed in all handlers (P1 race). File as codereview tag. Need to add mutex for s_provider and ensure all globals protected. Mimic coap_msg.c pattern.
